title: × Agrositanion saundersii

taxonomy: × Agrositanion saundersii is classified as a hybrid species in the plant kingdom. It belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The genus Agrositanion is a hybrid genus, resulting from the cross between the genera Agrostis and Stipa. The species × Agrositanion saundersii is likely to be a hybrid between a species of Agrostis and a species of Stipa, but the exact parentage is not well-documented. Further research is needed to confirm the classification and parentage of this species.
